name: sora2-vault-viewer
author: tinatsu-nomy
description: Local viewer for Sora 2 manifests and exported media/text data

scripts.check: node --check app/server.js && node --check app/server_runtime.js && node --check app/indexer.js && node --check app/indexing/common.js && node --check app/indexing/text.js && node --check app/indexing/manifest.js && node --check app/indexing/local-match.js && node --check app/store.js && node --check app/http/serializers.js && node --check app/search/query.js && node --check app/search/listing.js && node --check app/state/index-state.js && node --check app/public/state.js && node --check app/public/render.js && node --check app/public/api.js && node --check app/public/app.js && node --check electron/main.js
